prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.5 kg; Height 166.3 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.3%; 3 months ago 5.8%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.2kg; 9 months ago 65.8kg; 6 months ago 64.2kg; 3 months ago 63.2kg; current 65.5kg), Height (12 months ago 166.3cm; 9 months ago 166.3cm; 6 months ago 166.3cm; 3 months ago 166.3cm; current 166.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 237mg/g; 9 months ago 232mg/g; 6 months ago 166mg/g; 3 months ago 233mg/g; current 176mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 150mg/dL; 9 months ago 135mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
